'''Zo Howler''' was a [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] who represented the [[Raioballo sector/Legends|Raioballo sector]] and the [[Gravlex Med/Legends|Gravlex Med]] [[Gravlex Med system/Legends|system]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Howler's term began shortly before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]. Prior to election, he had been [[President/Legends|President]] of Gravlex Med. He was of a younger generation than [[Horox Ryyder/Legends|Horox Ryyder]], and Ryyder hoped Howler could achieve peace where he felt he had failed, due to the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. Howler and his aide, [[Fo Kuna]], attended Horox's retirement ceremony. Thus Howler was later part of the [[Loyalist Committee/Legends|Loyalist Committee]] that Palpatine saw as a key cabinet in the fight against the Separatists.
